employees.name: Greg Groves
employees.cod: Fell asleep while driving due to not sleeping for 3 days so he could finish a work project
employees.sentence: Sold soul for middle management position

employees.name: Sheila McCarthy
employees.cod: Mysteriously fell off a mountain during a hike
employees.sentence: Traded soul for 20 years with her ex-husband’s fortune

employees.name: Raymond Dacosta
employees.cod: Heart failure after drinking a red bull everyday for 40 years
employees.sentence: Literally not a soul on earth liked this man

employees.name: Eric Miller
employees.cod: Electrocuted while changing wire on a DIY home renovation project
employees.sentence: Retained a superiority complex so large it isolated him.

employees.name: Laura Chen
employees.cod: Drove the wrong way on the freeway

employees.name: James Wilson
employees.cod: Natural causes, fueled by caffeine addiction

employees.name: Jordan Barker
employees.cod: Spent 48 hours straight gaming without food or water
employees.sentence: Had too many vices to outweigh the virtues.

employees.name: Patricia Vance
employees.cod: Heart attack during a high-stakes negotiation
employees.sentence: Would sell her own mother for a 5% commission, but sold her soul for a failed business instead

employees.name: Regina Gomez
employees.sentence: Soul tarnished beyond recognizable human standards

task_templates.title: Fix the Printer
